name: stakataka
flavor_texts: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.
When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.
text: Stakataka is the Rampart Pokémon. It is a rock and steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: beast-boost. Base stats — HP: 61, Attack: 131, Defense: 211, Sp. Atk: 53, Sp. Def: 101, Speed: 13. Evolution line: stakataka. Lore: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other. When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.
